analysis.overallDescription: The scene shows a worker near heavy machinery. The worker is wearing a hard hat but appears to be missing a high-visibility safety vest.

constructionSafety.summary: A worker is near heavy machinery. It appears this person does not have on the appropriate PPE of a high-visibility safety vest.
issues: Worker without high-visibility vest visible near machinery.
recommendations: Ensure all workers near heavy machinery are wearing appropriate PPE, including high-visibility vests.
Review PPE requirements with all personnel on site.
